channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Meidling ↔ Wien Hauptbahnhof
item.description: Due to a technical fault on the train, only limited journeys between Wien Meidling Bahnhof (U) and Wien Hbf (U) to 08:12 were possible. [Since 12.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to a technical fault on the train, only limited journeys between Wien Meidling Bahnhof (U) and Wien Hbf (U) to 08:12 were possible.
[Since 12.06.2026]

item.title: 33A: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 12.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 12.06.2026]

item.title: U6: defective vehicle
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 12.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 12.06.2026]

item.title: U5: Spitalgasse from 29 to 33
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a minimum 2.00 m wide … [11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a minimum 2.00 m wide …
[11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: U5: Währinger Straße 40-42 to 54
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out at day and, if necessary, at night, at the time of 22:00 to 05:00 at … [11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out at day and, if necessary, at night, at the time of 22:00 to 05:00 at …
[11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: 19A: roadworks Alaudagasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse range, the 19A line is redirected. [11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse range, the 19A line is redirected.
[11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]

item.title: 67A/67B: construction works Alaudagasse
item.description: Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse lines 67A and 67B are redirected. [11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Alaudagasse lines 67A and 67B are redirected.
[11.06.2026 – 17.07.2026]

item.title: S1/S2/S3/S4/S7: S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1), 2)
item.description: S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1) Because of construction works, the Vienna Stammstrecke as well as the northern branches are blocked. [10.06.2026 – 08.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
S-Bahn-Stammstrecke (phase 1) Because of construction works, the Vienna Stammstrecke as well as the northern branches are blocked.
[10.06.2026 – 08.09.2026]
